title: Approval of FY2024 Annual Financial Results
description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2024 annual financial statements. Net profit of ZMW 1.1 billion achieved, up 16% from FY2023.

title: Dividend Declaration — ZMW 220 Million Interim
description: The Board resolved to declare an interim dividend of ZMW 220 million for FY2024 payable to the Government of the Republic of Zambia.

title: Mine Rehabilitation Fund Actuarial Review
description: The Board resolved to commission an independent actuarial review of mine rehabilitation closure cost estimates across all 14 tailings storage facilities.

title: Dividend Recommendation to AGM — ZMW 275 Million
description: The Board resolved to recommend a final dividend of ZMW 275 million for FY2023 to the Annual General Meeting for approval.

title: Endorsement of ERB Tariff Application
description: The Board resolved to endorse the submission of a cost-reflective tariff application to the Energy Regulation Board targeting a 35% tariff increase.
